component.name: chip
component.description: Compact interactive label for filtering, tagging, and categorization.

implementation_notes.rtl: RTL axis was present in Figma manifest (288 variants) but produces zero CSS differences across all comparisons. RTL is handled at the container level via [dir='rtl'] and CSS logical properties (padding-inline). All 144 RTL duplicate variants are excluded from this reference.
implementation_notes.on_color_style_parity: Primary and Neutral on-color variants share identical token values for all states. In CSS, .chip--on-color is a single modifier that overrides both background and text regardless of style. The on-color axis is preserved here for traceability to the Figma manifest.
implementation_notes.padding_invariance: All three sizes share the same padding-inline (--chip-padding-inline = 12px). Only height changes per size. Design team to confirm this is intentional at Large.

focus_outline_deviation.figma_implementation: Fixed-size RECTANGLE node: Small 55×28px, Medium 59×32px, Large 68×40px
focus_outline_deviation.reason: Supports dynamic label length and responsive content. Figma values assume fixed label 'Item' and break on longer text.

small._note: 20px height is below 24px touch target minimum. See CHIP-A11Y-004.

shared_base._note: height, font-size, line-height, font-weight are size-dependent — see size_tokens. border-radius is overridden by .chip--rounded.
